title: Gap Inc. Partners with Klarna to Offer Seamless, Flexible Payments Across Portfolio of Brands
full_text:
Shoppers can now choose Klarna's flexible ways to pay at Old Navy, Gap, Banana Republic, and Athleta 

SAN FRANCISCO & NEW YORK — September 11, 2025 — Gap Inc., America’s largest specialty apparel retailer, announced today it is partnering with Klarna, the global digital bank and flexible payments provider, to offer Klarna’s suite of payment options to U.S. shoppers across Gap Inc.’s portfolio of iconic brands, including Old Navy, Gap, Banana Republic and Athleta. 

"We are excited to offer our customers more choice, convenience and control by offering a variety of payment options across our portfolio of brands," said Kevin Meiners, Head of Loyalty & Payments at Gap Inc. 

The partnership is now live, giving Gap Inc. shoppers instant access to Klarna’s flexible payment options just as the season’s newest styles arrive. 

U.S. shoppers now have the option to access Klarna’s flexible and interest-free payment options online. With Klarna's Pay in Full, customers can pay immediately for what they love through Klarna’s seamless payments experience, or choose Pay in 4, to split the cost into four equal interest-free installments. This expansion reinforces Klarna’s position as the everyday spending partner of choice for millions of Americans, with solutions designed to meet shoppers wherever they are—online or in-app. 

"Gap Inc. is a household name with a portfolio of beloved brands that are woven into the everyday lives of American consumers," said David Sykes, Chief Commercial Officer at Klarna. "By offering Klarna at checkout, Gap Inc. is giving millions of shoppers the flexibility to shop how and when they want, while also supporting a personalized way to pay." 

The launch with Gap Inc. builds on Klarna’s growing U.S. footprint of over 26 million active US customers and more than 724,000 global merchants and marks another milestone in Klarna’s mission to provide smarter, more empowering shopping experiences.
